info.title: SEO Audit API
info.description: SEO Audit API. Full on-page SEO audit: title, meta description, H1–H6 headings, image alt coverage, internal/external links, Open Graph, schema.org types, canonical URL, robots meta, and a 0–100 SEO score with grade. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Full on-page SEO audit: title, meta description, H1–H6 headings, image alt coverage, internal/external links, Open Graph, schema.org types, canonical URL, robots meta, and a 0–100 SEO score with grade.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
